$comment: Provider presets for the interactive picker (tui.mjs provider-picker flow) and the --provider CLI flag. Each preset is a complete {primary, tiers} map. Selecting a preset writes ~/.config/opencode/models.json from the chosen entry. LM Studio maps all tiers to the single locally-loaded model (vision gets a warning since local models are rarely multimodal). Edit model IDs here as providers release newer versions.

openrouter.$comment: OpenRouter is a router - picker prompts for a model string per tier. This entry is a template; tui.mjs expands it by prompting.
openrouter.label: OpenRouter (custom per tier)
